nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

nodes.name: George Ernest Shelley
nodes.summary: George Ernest Shelley是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联12种鸟类，包括Somali courser、Sandy scops owl、Lilian's lovebird等12种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Red-naped bushshrike
nodes.summary: Red-naped bushshrike（Red-naped bushshrike，学名 Laniarius ruficeps），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联1个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括灌丛。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: kismayensis (top) | image2 = Laniarius ruficeps - Adrien Jailloux - 607781219.jpeg | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | genus = Laniarius | species = ruficeps | authority = (Shelley, 1885) | synonyms = Dryoscopus ruficeps Shelley, 1885 }} The red-naped bushshrike or red-naped boubou (Laniarius ruficeps) is a species of bird in the family Malaconotidae, which is native to the dry lowlands of the eastern Afrotropics

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Its natural habitat is subtropical and tropical dry shrubland, under above sea level
